questionHtml:
What could be used as evidence for evolution?

I. Selective breeding of domesticated animals

II. The fossil record

III. Homologous structures

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: What could be used as evidence for evolution? I. Selective breeding of domesticated animals II. The fossil record III. Homologous structures A. I and II only B. I and III only C. I
